countries.name: Albania
countries.shortDescription: Europe's best-kept coastal secret — turquoise beaches, Ottoman old towns and Alpine valleys at prices the rest of the continent forgot about.

countries.name: Austria
countries.shortDescription: Imperial Vienna, Mozart concerts, Alpine lakes and ski villages — Austria mixes high culture with high altitude.

countries.name: Bosnia and Herzegovina
countries.shortDescription: Where East meets West — Ottoman mosques, Austro-Hungarian facades, turquoise rivers and a moving 20th-century story.

countries.name: Belgium
countries.shortDescription: Medieval squares, Trappist beers, and the capital of the EU — Belgium punches far above its size.

countries.name: Bulgaria
countries.shortDescription: Black Sea beaches, Rila monasteries, ski resorts and one of the cheapest capitals in the EU — Bulgaria stretches DiscoverEU budgets the furthest.

countries.name: Switzerland
countries.shortDescription: The continent's most scenic railway network through the Alps — stunning, precise, and famously expensive.

countries.name: Cyprus
countries.shortDescription: A divided island with 9000 years of history, sun almost year-round, and beaches most of Europe can only dream about. Reached by plane via DiscoverEU flight alternative.

countries.name: Czech Republic
countries.shortDescription: Fairytale Prague, the world's best beer, and affordable prices — the favourite first stop for many Interrailers.

countries.name: Germany
countries.shortDescription: Efficient trains, vibrant cities, and centuries of history — Germany is the anchor of the DiscoverEU network.

countries.name: Denmark
countries.shortDescription: Hygge central — fairy-tale harbours, bike lanes everywhere, Scandinavian design, and Noma-grade food. Expensive but easy.

countries.name: Estonia
countries.shortDescription: Medieval Tallinn plus Europe's most digital society, endless bogs, forests and islands — the cool, calm gateway to the Baltics.

countries.name: Spain
countries.shortDescription: Late dinners, all-night fiestas, sun-drenched coasts and Moorish palaces — Spain is the DiscoverEU party anchor.

countries.name: Finland
countries.shortDescription: Land of a thousand lakes, midnight sun in summer and Northern Lights in winter — the world's happiest country is also its quietest.

countries.name: France
countries.shortDescription: From Paris boulevards to Provence lavender and Alpine peaks — France offers the widest travel palette in Europe.

countries.name: Greece
countries.shortDescription: Where European civilization began — ancient ruins, whitewashed island villages, turquoise seas, and endless souvlaki.

countries.name: Croatia
countries.shortDescription: 1244 islands, Roman ruins, Game of Thrones backdrops, and the Adriatic's clearest water — Croatia is the Mediterranean in HD.

countries.name: Hungary
countries.shortDescription: Budapest's ruin bars, thermal baths, and grand Danube skyline make Hungary an unmissable central-European stop.

countries.name: Ireland
countries.shortDescription: Emerald cliffs, trad music in every pub, literary cities and the warmest welcome in Europe — Ireland is everyone's spiritual second home.

countries.name: Iceland
countries.shortDescription: A raw, otherworldly volcanic island of glaciers, geysers and waterfalls — the priciest DiscoverEU stop, and worth every króna.

countries.name: Italy
countries.shortDescription: The living museum of Europe — Roman ruins, Renaissance art, Alpine lakes, and the best pizza on the planet.

countries.name: Liechtenstein
countries.shortDescription: Europe's fourth-smallest country — a fairy-tale Alpine principality you can cross on foot in an afternoon.

countries.name: Lithuania
countries.shortDescription: Baroque Vilnius, the Curonian Spit dunes, and a strong independent streak — the biggest Baltic state packs real variety for its size.

countries.name: Luxembourg
countries.shortDescription: A tiny trilingual grand duchy with free public transport, dramatic old-town views and more castles per square km than anywhere else.

countries.name: Latvia
countries.shortDescription: Riga's art nouveau skyline, white-sand Baltic beaches and wild forests — the middle Baltic state punches above its weight.

countries.name: North Macedonia
countries.shortDescription: Lake Ohrid, ancient churches and the Šar Mountains — an affordable Balkan escape still largely off the DiscoverEU radar.

countries.name: Malta
countries.shortDescription: A sun-bleached limestone archipelago of megalithic temples, knightly fortresses, English-speaking bars and turquoise coves — reached by DiscoverEU flight alternative.

countries.name: Netherlands
countries.shortDescription: Flat, bike-friendly, multilingual and famously liberal — the easiest landing pad for a first European solo trip.

countries.name: Norway
countries.shortDescription: Fjords that cut hundreds of km inland, northern lights in winter, midnight sun in summer — Norway is Europe at its most dramatic (and most expensive).

countries.name: Poland
countries.shortDescription: Medieval old towns, heavy 20th-century history, and some of the lowest prices in the EU — Poland stretches a travel budget further than almost anywhere.

countries.name: Portugal
countries.shortDescription: Tile-lined hills, fado nights, Atlantic surf and pastel de nata — Portugal is the mellow, budget-friendly corner of Western Europe.

countries.name: Romania
countries.shortDescription: Carpathian bears, Saxon villages, Bran Castle and one of the EU's cheapest cost-of-living — Romania is undervalued real estate for DiscoverEU trips.

countries.name: Serbia
countries.shortDescription: Belgrade's floating raft-bar nightlife is legendary, the food is huge and the prices low — the Balkans' biggest capital is not yet DiscoverEU but worth the side-trip.

countries.name: Sweden
countries.shortDescription: Forests, archipelagos, design-forward cities and the right-to-roam — Sweden is the gold standard for sustainable northern travel.

countries.name: Slovenia
countries.shortDescription: Lake Bled's island church, Julian Alps peaks, emerald rivers and a tiny green capital — Slovenia is Europe in miniature.

countries.name: Slovakia
countries.shortDescription: The High Tatras, 180+ castles, and old-town Bratislava just a train ride from Vienna — Slovakia is central Europe's quiet outdoor playground.

countries.name: Turkey
countries.shortDescription: Where Europe meets Asia — Ottoman mosques, Mediterranean coasts, Cappadocian balloons and the warmest welcome on the continent. The Turkish bonus anchor of DiscoverEU Companion.
